name: CITIC-Prudential BRICs Positive Allocation Stock QDII Fund(LOF)
summary: CITIC-Prudential BRICs Positive Allocation Stock QDII Fund(LOF) is a fund focused on investing in the stock markets of Brazil, Russia, India, and China, aiming for capital appreciation. It is managed by CITIC-Prudential Fund Management Company and allows for both subscription and redemption in the secondary market. The fund is based in China.
